'''''Ewoks'' 7''' is the seventh issue of [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|Marvel's ''Ewoks'']] series of comic books and was published under the [[Marvel Comics]] [[Star Comics]] imprint on [[February 4]], [[1986]] with a cover date of [[May]] 1986. This story is split into three chapters: "The Perilous Laughing Spell," "A Near Riot," and "Moving the Mountain."
